program.name: Refund Ledger Stateful
intake.purpose: Carry refund request state through normalization, policy application, and ledger posting.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"normalize_refund","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text.order_id","inputs.initial_user_text.original_amount_cents","inputs.initial_user_text.refund_requested"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","order_id":"string","original_amount_cents":"number","refund_requested":"boolean"},"items_json":["order:<order_id>","amount_cents:<original_amount_cents>"]},"rules":["Parse input.domain[\"inputs.initial_user_text\"] as JSON.","Echo order_id, original_amount_cents, and refund_requested from the request without applying policy decisions."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal normalize_refund.","items_json must be exactly [\"order:<order_id>\", \"amount_cents:<original_amount_cents>\"]."]}},{"slug":"apply_refund_policy","domain_spec":{"reads":["normalize_refund.output.result_json.order_id","normalize_refund.output.result_json.original_amount_cents","normalize_refund.output.result_json.refund_requested","inputs.initial_user_text.delivered_days_ago"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","order_id":"string","delivered_days_ago":"number","refund_pct":"number","refund_cents":"number","policy_code":"string"},"items_json":["policy:<policy_code>","refund_cents:<refund_cents>"]},"rules":["Parse normalize_refund.output.result_json and the original request JSON before applying policy.","If refund_requested is false, refund_pct is 0 and policy_code is no_request.","If refund_requested is true and delivered_days_ago is less than or equal to 30, refund_pct is 100 and policy_code is full_refund_window.","If refund_requested is true and delivered_days_ago is greater than 30 and less than or equal to 60, refund_pct is 50 and policy_code is partial_refund_window.","If refund_requested is true and delivered_days_ago is greater than 60, refund_pct is 0 and policy_code is outside_refund_window.","refund_cents = Math.round(original_amount_cents * refund_pct / 100)."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal apply_refund_policy.","order_id must be preserved from normalize_refund.","items_json must be exactly [\"policy:<policy_code>\", \"refund_cents:<refund_cents>\"]."]}},{"slug":"ledger_posting","domain_spec":{"reads":["apply_refund_policy.output.result_json.order_id","apply_refund_policy.output.result_json.refund_cents","apply_refund_policy.output.result_json.policy_code"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","order_id":"string","posting_type":"string","amount_cents":"number","source_policy":"string"},"items_json":["posting:<posting_type>","amount_cents:<amount_cents>"]},"rules":["Parse apply_refund_policy.output.result_json before posting.","posting_type is refund when refund_cents is greater than 0; otherwise posting_type is no_refund.","amount_cents must equal apply_refund_policy.output.result_json.refund_cents.","source_policy must equal apply_refund_policy.output.result_json.policy_code."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal ledger_posting.","The ledger amount must preserve the policy refund_cents without recomputing from the original request.","items_json must be exactly [\"posting:<posting_type>\", \"amount_cents:<amount_cents>\"]."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
